title: Emergency Stop Sequence
description:
Emergency Stop Sequence

Emergency Stop Sequence

The following actions occur when the Emergency Stop circuit has been broken:

			All tasks are immediately stopped.
			The E-STOP LED on the robot controller front panel is turned on.
			If a Trap Emergency function has been enabled, then this function is called.

If you want to restart the current project, use the Restart command in the Trap Emergency handler.

After the emergency stop has occurred, you must clear it. See Clearing Emergency Stop Condition.
